## CustomAnnotationRegistration.inheritFromBase property

Optional type-level inheritance behavior for semantic consumers.

`"local-wins"` means a derived declaration inherits this annotation from its base declaration only when the derived declaration does not provide the same extension annotation identity locally. Omitted registrations behave as `"never"`.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly inheritFromBase?: AnnotationInheritancePolicy;
```
